steps.title: Separate claim from example
steps.content: The first statement says travelers flew out of major urban airports with increasing frequency. The next statement gives Washington Dulles International Airport as a specific example, so it should begin a new sentence with For example.

steps.title: Avoid broken example markers
steps.content: Choice A creates a comma splice. Choice B places a semicolon after for example, separating the marker from the example. Choice C makes For example a sentence fragment before the airport sentence. The answer is D.
